questions.question: Describe the primary function of the user interface in an operating system. How does it facilitate interaction between users and the operating system?
questions.hint: Focus on the key components and their roles

questions.question: Explain the difference between a command-line interface (CLI) and a graphical user interface (GUI). Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Use a simple analogy to explain the concepts

questions.question: A user executes a command in the command-line interface. Describe the sequence of events that occur between the user's input, the operating system's execution, and the resulting output.
questions.hint: Focus on the technical details of the process
